mapper.select: select dept_id from sb_user_permission_dept where user_id = #{userId} and delete_time is null and customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.update: update sb_user_permission_dept set delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into sb_user_permission_dept (id, user_id, customer_id, dept_id, create_by, create_time) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{customerId}, #{deptId}, #{createBy}, sysdate())

insert into sb_user_permission_dept (id, user_id, customer_id, dept_id, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.userId}, #{item.customerId}, #{item.deptId}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate())
on duplicate key update delete_by = null, delete_time = null
